verses.text: Amaute Egypt gam panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kum nihna a kha masa sungin Sinai sehnel gamah Topa in Moses kiangah
“A kiseh hunin Paisan Pawi, Israel mite khamsak in
A kiseh hun, tu kha ni sawmleli ni nitakin a thukhamte leh a ngeina kip omte bangin na kham ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Paisan Pawi a khamna dingun Moses in Israel mite tungah a gen hi
Amaute in a kha masa, a ni sawmleli ni nitakin Sinai sehnel gamah Paisan Pawi kham uh a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite a gamta uh hi
Misi luang a lawn'na uh hangin a nin mi pawlkhat om uh a, tua ni-in amaute in Paisan Pawi kham theilo uh ahih manin Moses leh Aaron' mai-ah pai uh hi
Tua mite in, “Misi luang lawn'na hangin ka nin uh hi. Ahi ta zongin bang hangin a kiseh hunin Israel midangte tawh Topa biakna hong kipiasak khawmlo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Moses in amaute kiangah, “Note' thu tawh kisai, Topa' thupiak ka zak dong na ngak dih un,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah

“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note' lakah mi khatpeuh ahi a, na suanlekhakte uh khatpeuh in ahi zongin misi luang lawn'na hangin a nin ahi a, khualzinin gamlapi-ah a om ahi zongin, Topa-a' dingin Paisan Pawi kham veve ding hi
A kha nihna a ni sawmleli ni nitakin amaute in kham ding uh a, amaute in silngo sawhloh anlum leh a kha meh tawh ne ding uh hi
Amaute in a zingsang dong bangmah siitlo ding uh a, a guh khat zong sutanlo ding uh hi. Paisan Pawi ngeinate tawh kizui-in amaute in a kham ding uh hi

Ahih hangin a siang mi khat khualzinlo napi-in Paisan Pawi a kham kei leh, amah in a kiseh hunin Topa biakna pialo ahih manin a mite lak panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi. Tua mi in ama khialhna mah thuak ding hi

“Note' lakah khualmi khat hong peemin, Topa-a' dingin Paisan Pawi a kham leh Paisan Pawi thukhamte leh a ngeina kipte bangin hih ding hi. Peemta leh tualsung mite-a' dingin ngeina a kibang na neikhawm ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Biakbuk a kidin'sak ni-in meii in thuciamna biakbuk tuam a, nitaka kipan a zingsang dong meikuang tawh kibangin biakbuk tung sanah a om hi
Tua bangin omden hi. Sunin meii in tuam a, zanin mei tawh a kibang khat in tuam hi
Puanbuk tung san panin meii a kilaktoh khit ciangin Israel mite dingkhia uh a, meii a kiphuhna munah Israel mite in giahphual a sat uh hi
Topa in thu a piak ciangin Israel mite dingkhia uh a, Topa in thu a piak ciangin amaute in giahphual a sat uh hi. Biakbuk tung sanah meii a khawl laiteng, amaute zong giahphualah om uh hi
Biakbuk tungah ni tampi sung meii a om khinta zongin Israel mite in Topa' thupiakna zui-in dingkhia tuanlo uh hi
Biakbuk tungah ni tawmno sung bek meii om thei zel hi. Tua bang ciangin zong Topa' thupiak bangin giahphualah amaute tawmno sung mah omin, Topa' thupiakna bangin amaute a dingkhia uh hi

Khat veivei nitaka kipan zingsang dong tua meii om hi. Zingsangin meii a kilaktoh ciangin amaute dingkhia uh a, tua ahih kei leh, sun khat leh zan khat a omlai leh zong, meii a kilaktoh hun hunin amaute dingkhia uh hi
Ni nih ahi a, kha khat ahi a, a hun sauzaw ahi zongin biakbuk tung sanah meii a khawl laiteng giahphualah Israel mite omin dingkhialo uh a, ahih hangin a kilaktoh peuh ciangin amaute dingkhia uh hi
Topa' thupiakna tawh amaute in giahphual sat uh a, Topa' thupiakna mah tawh amaute dingkhia uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in Topa' thu a mang uh hi.
